Header.Provenance: Validated Opportunity from input file DR_Opportunity_template.yaml

Opportunity.title: Short descriptive title of the Opportunity
Opportunity.description: Statement of the general purpose of this Opportunity's data request.
Opportunity.expected_impacts: (Optional) Explanation of why this combination of variables and experiments is important.
Opportunity.justification_of_resources: (Optional) Explanation of how the requested variables map onto the impacts, and estimate of the resources required.

example_experiment_group.title: Short descriptive title of the Experiment Group

example_variable_group.title: Short descriptive title of the Variable Group
example_variable_group.justification: (Optional) Explanation of why these variables are important.
example_variable_group.notes: (Optional) Any additional comments about the variable group.
